pages.text: The $(item)Nether Forest Skyseed$() — a $(item)Forest Skyseed$() with crimson and warped stems and a shroomlight. A full-size $(bold)fungal forest$(): crimson by default, warped in a warped biome.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)A $(item)Forest$() seed thrown $(bold)in the Nether$() sprouts a small fungal grove — crimson and warped stems, and a shroomlight or two.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

Tier-2 of the fungal forest: a $(bold)full-size$() island thick with $(bold)huge fungi$(). By default it grows $(item)Crimson$() — crimson nylium, towering crimson fungi, weeping vines and shroomlight, with a pack of $(item)Hoglins$() and Piglins rooting about.

$(bold)Warped instead$()$(br)Throw it in a $(item)Warped Forest$() biome and the whole isle turns teal — warped nylium, huge warped fungi, nether sprouts, and $(item)Endermen$() in place of the hoglins. Same seed, two forests.

$(bold)Yields$()$(br)Stems and shroomlight for building, fungi for breeding hoglins and steering striders, nylium to spread your own forest. $(br)$(br)Thrown $(bold)topside$() it shrugs and makes a tiny tuft of a grass island instead — a seed's a seed. Crafted from a $(item)Forest Skyseed$() with crimson and warped stems and a shroomlight.
